deliverables.description: Three-sheet formulation screen workbook with raw inputs, intermediate calculations, validation checks, uncertainty notes, needs_review items, and final decision table.

original_fields.summary: All three packet runs fail the decision rule because impurity is above 10% in every row. Run2 and Run3 meet the yield threshold, but neither meets the impurity threshold. Exact row/value citations are embedded in the workbook.

task: Advanced task: Solubility formulation screen. Chemistry packet: Run1 temp=69C catalyst=2mol% solvent=MeCN yield=63 impurity=17%; Run2 temp=84C catalyst=3mol% solvent=EtOAc yield=77 impurity=14%; Run3 temp=99C catalyst=3mol% solvent=MeCN yield=80 impurity=23%. Rule: target yield>70 and impurity<10. Produce the stated deliverable with calculations, assumptions, exceptions, and exact row/value citations. Do not invent additional records; mark missing inputs as needs_review. Include intermediate calculations, uncertainty or sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. The response should be executable from the embedded packet alone, with no external data lookup required beyond understanding the cited public removed context.
